items.title: Fix failing desktopBridge test by mocking indexedDB
items.action: Import `fake-indexeddb/auto` at the top of `src/services/desktopBridge.test.ts` to polyfill `indexedDB` in the jsdom test environment.

items.title: Add ESLint configuration
items.action: Create `eslint.config.mjs` with TypeScript-ESLint, React hooks rules, and minimal sensible defaults. Add `eslint` and `@eslint/js`, `typescript-eslint`, `eslint-plugin-react-hooks` as devDependencies. Add `npm run lint:eslint` script.

items.title: Add Vitest coverage reporting
items.action: Add `@vitest/coverage-v8` devDependency, add `npm run test:coverage` script, and create `vitest.config.ts` extending existing Vite config with coverage thresholds.

items.title: Add CodeQL security analysis workflow
items.action: Create `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` with standard GitHub CodeQL init/analyze steps for JavaScript/TypeScript, running on push/PR to main and weekly cron.

items.title: Add lockfile integrity check to CI
items.action: Update `.github/workflows/ci.yml` to run `npm ci --prefer-offline` and verify `package-lock.json` is in sync with `package.json`.

items.title: Update CHANGELOG.md with RUP execution entries
items.action: Add an `[Unreleased]` section documenting the CI fix, test fix, ESLint addition, coverage addition, and CodeQL addition.
